case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: user notice; algorithmic transparency; service mechanism disclosure
case_summary.adjudication_note: Best coverage of notice plus basic principles, purposes, motives, and mechanisms; internal evidence adds little beyond the passage cue.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: non-targeted recommendation option; recommendation switch-off right; user tag controls; explanation for major rights impacts
case_summary.adjudication_note: Most complete condition for this case; covers opt-out, deletion of tags, and significant-rights explanation/liability.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: minor protection; beneficial content access; harmful content restriction; online addiction prevention
case_summary.adjudication_note: Captures beneficial information and harmful-content restrictions; evidence is partly generic but not misleading.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: elderly user rights; elderly-suited smart services; telecom and online fraud protection; worker rights in dispatch services; platform labor algorithm governance
case_summary.adjudication_note: Correctly notes elderly and worker obligations, but first finding focuses mostly on elderly-service implementation gaps.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: confidentiality in supervision; complaint and report right; complaint handling obligation
case_summary.adjudication_note: Best result: covers confidentiality, no disclosure/sale/illegal provision, and complaint/report mechanism.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: filing fraud sanctions; filing cancellation; administrative penalties; public opinion or social mobilization services
case_summary.adjudication_note: Correctly identifies filing fraud and penalties but does not fully capture filing cancellation after service cessation or grave unlawful situations.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: mainstream value orientation; prohibited algorithmic recommendation uses; harmful information prevention; unlawful content dissemination
case_summary.adjudication_note: Strong surface reading of positive-orientation, prohibited harms, and harmful-information prevention duties.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: algorithmic security responsibility; governance systems and technical measures; technology ethics review; regular algorithm assessment; addiction and excessive consumption controls
case_summary.adjudication_note: Most complete result: captures systems, technical measures, ethics review, monitoring, and regular checks.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: information security management; unlawful and harmful information database; synthetic information indicator; unlawful content takedown and reporting; records preservation
case_summary.adjudication_note: Accurately captures marking and immediate handling of unlawful/harmful information.

case_summary.source_name: Internet Information Service Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: recommendation transparency and understandability; content intervention encouragement; Internet news information permit; fake news generation ban; news source restrictions
case_summary.adjudication_note: Useful but overstates Article 12 encouraged transparency language as a mandatory obligation and underplays news-permit/fake-news prohibitions.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: right to explanation; individual decision-making; high-risk AI deployer obligation; legal or similarly significant effects; exceptions and restrictions
case_summary.adjudication_note: Best result: captures explanation right and the Union/national-law and otherwise-provided-for limitations.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: AI Act subject matter; harmonised AI market rules; prohibited AI practices; high-risk AI obligations; AI transparency rules; general-purpose AI model rules; governance and enforcement; SME innovation support
case_summary.adjudication_note: Correctly treats this as a subject-matter provision, though it frames general rules as direct obligations.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: administrative fines; operator non-compliance penalties; notified body non-compliance penalties; misleading information penalties; SME fine cap
case_summary.adjudication_note: Strong report on non-compliance fines across operators and notified bodies.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: high-risk classification exception; significant risk threshold; decision-making influence; Annex III systems; profiling always high-risk
case_summary.adjudication_note: Correctly captures non-high-risk exceptions and the profiling carve-out, but could be clearer that this is classification criteria, not an operator duty.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: technical documentation; human oversight assessment; interpretability support for deployers; pre-determined changes documentation; validation and testing evidence; discriminatory impact metrics; cybersecurity measures
case_summary.adjudication_note: Strong coverage of oversight assessment, technical interpretation measures, validation/testing data, metrics, logs/reports, and cybersecurity.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: risk management system; lifecycle review and updating; risk identification and analysis; foreseeable misuse evaluation; post-market monitoring feedback; targeted risk management measures
case_summary.adjudication_note: Strong report; blackbox and whitebox both align with the main risk-management obligation.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: high-risk AI testing; targeted risk management measures; real-world testing option; pre-market testing; defined metrics and thresholds; minor and vulnerable group impact consideration
case_summary.adjudication_note: Best coverage: targeted risk management, consistency, compliance, pre-market timing, and defined metrics/thresholds.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: human oversight design; human-machine interface; health safety and fundamental rights risk minimization; proportionate oversight measures; provider and deployer oversight responsibilities
case_summary.adjudication_note: Strongly captures effective human oversight, risk-proportionate measures, and context/autonomy calibration.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: human oversight capabilities; capacity and limitation understanding; anomaly monitoring; automation bias awareness; output interpretation; override or reverse output; safe interruption
case_summary.adjudication_note: Useful because it includes override output capability; should be clearer on as-appropriate/proportionate qualifier.

case_summary.source_name: EU AI Act
case_summary.gold_issue_tags: notified body designation restriction; certificate impact assessment; reporting to Commission and Member States; unduly issued certificate suspension or withdrawal; competent authority information sharing; risk mitigation
case_summary.adjudication_note: Best coverage of notification, certificate action, and conformity/risk-avoidance duties.
